message:
test(fcp-mesh): add comprehensive DeviceProfile unit tests

Expand test coverage for DeviceProfile capability reporting, resource
constraints, and fitness scoring as required by flywheel_connectors-u4ej.

New test categories:
- Golden vectors: CBOR serialization, fitness calculation determinism
- Capability reporting: CPU, memory, storage, network, power states
- Resource constraints: CPU-bound, memory-bound, GPU/TPU requirements
- Fitness ranking: ordering, tie-breaking by node_id, eligibility
- Serialization: CBOR roundtrip, JSON roundtrip, enum formats

Test count increased from 16 to 36 tests + 1 doc test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
